name: law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract renewal deadlines cause legal penalties. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Missed contract renewal deadlines due to lack of tracking.
features: Manual entry option for contract details
